metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4570
metadata.comment:
Rationale: SPAR2/SIPA1L2 is enriched in the PSD fraction of a PSD preparation from adult rat cerebellum (Figure 3d). It coimmunoprecipitates with ProSAP-interacting protein from the postsynaptic protein complex in rat cerebellar lysate (Figure 3e). Confocal imaging of dendrites from hippocampal neurons shows localization to postsynaptic spines (Figure 5c).. Experimental description: PSD preparation of adult rat cerebellum. Antibody against SIPA1L2 from rabbit and guinea pig were generated using the first 93 amino acids of rat SPAR2 expressed as glutathione-S- transferase (GST)-tagged fusion proteins in Escherichia coli BL21, purified, and used for generation of rabbit and guinea pig polyclonal antibodies.

Co-immunoprecipitation of SPAR2 and ProSAPiP was performed from rat cerebellar lysates.
